summary: CRITICAL: Tests are entirely missing (task requires Pester tests with red/green TDD; tests directory referenced in workflow but no test files provided). Workflow violates explicit instructions: invokes `pwsh -NoProfile -File` from within pwsh shell instead of using `shell: pwsh` directly (lines 56-57). Error handling broken: try-catch won't capture subprocess exit codes properly. Missing `Set-StrictMode` in Generate-Matrix.ps1 (present in module but not CLI wrapper). Configuration validation incomplete—doesn't validate axis value uniqueness or verify excluded entries exist. Subprocess invocation pattern makes local testing infeasible. Solution is unshippable without test implementation and workflow fix.
